import java.lang.System.Logger;
import java.lang.System.Logger.Level;

// System.Logger is a backend capture exactly like slf4j: reporting the caught
// and rethrowing it double-counts upstream (JV006).
class SystemLoggerDoubleCapture {
    private static final Logger log = System.getLogger("x");

    void reportAndRethrow() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV006"
            log.log(Level.ERROR, "failed", e);
            throw new RuntimeException("failed", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
